purpose: Expose backend product detail and variant data needed by the storefront without duplicating variant truth.
success_outcome: Backend product detail reads prove required option/variant/availability semantics against seeded data.

success_checks: Backend product detail payload exposes product identity, media, option dimensions, variants/SKU, option combinations, price data, and availability/sellability signals.
Backend distinguishes product not found or unpublished from valid product detail responses.
Single/default SKU products have deterministic selected/default variant behavior without requiring extra option selection.
evidence_required: Integration test output for product detail payload, variant combinations, availability, not-found/unpublished, and single/default SKU behavior.
Short note identifying native Medusa route versus thin read-only facade decision.

stop_conditions: Native Medusa APIs cannot satisfy required product detail semantics and no thin facade can be scoped safely.
Endpoint contract would conflict with API guidelines.
Verification cannot prove product detail variant behavior against seeded backend data.
required_handoff: Do not mark done without backend integration evidence for required product detail semantics.
